streamd API reference
Docs siteGitHub
    Preparing search index...
    • @streamd/react-native
    • Components

    Interface Components

    Override any subset of the default component map. Consumers provide this to renderReactNative or <StreamdMarkdownNative components={…} /> to swap in custom Text / View / Pressable wrappers.

    interface Components {
        blockquote?: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        list?: ComponentType<ListProps>;
        list_item?: ComponentType<ListItemProps>;
        heading?: ComponentType<HeadingProps>;
        paragraph?: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        code_block?: ComponentType<CodeBlockProps>;
        hr?: ComponentType<Record<never, never>>;
        table?: ComponentType<TableProps>;
        math_block?: ComponentType<MathProps>;
        text?: ComponentType<{ content: string }>;
        hardbreak?: ComponentType<Record<never, never>>;
        code_span?: ComponentType<CodeSpanProps>;
        em?: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        strong?: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        strikethrough?: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        link?: ComponentType<LinkProps>;
        image?: ComponentType<ImageProps>;
        escape?: ComponentType<{ content: string }>;
        math_inline?: ComponentType<MathProps>;
    }
    • Defined in react-native/src/types.ts:123
    Index

    Properties

    blockquote? list? list_item? heading? paragraph? code_block? hr? table? math_block? text? hardbreak? code_span? em? strong? strikethrough? link? image? escape? math_inline?

    code_span?: ComponentType<CodeSpanProps>

    Custom inline code-span component.
